control-interactions.interaction:
/YxXnvYDtCwJRHQUdongaw_ ArrowUp ArrowDown ArrowRight ArrowLeft
TJFE5mw30ClMLNdz/irrog_Moves the focus to the next cell within the same column or row in the respective directions.
5PhHX6qdR8I5DnARt7zdZQ_ArrowUp
CsN0UZPScjCVpSg2lZP8MA_If the focus is on the first row, the focus moves to the column header row.
SW5bX/lIvgF6YdaRk9OUMA_If the focus is on a cell of the first row, the focus moves to the related column header.
4o5zptxrFq/2ec2dI93iiw_ArrowDown
bn02ZGqUasfMqcl0skZmlA_If the focus is on the Select All or the Clear All checkbox, the focus moves to the row selector in the first visible row.
TaPERSZsyQZlPIvjwm/tRQ_If the focus is on the column header row, the focus moves to the first row.
FS3KLnw9sRgWfvKV+lmUvw_If the focus is on a row, the focus moves to the row below.
rWg38I7omLt/jwpJnWUdng_If the focus is on a cell, the focus moves to the cell below.
U23AH30uQeU+mUKkH4ug5Q_ArrowLeft
8MOAyLp2/1nHlJCuQOFR2w_If the focus is on the first cell, the focus moves to the row. This switches from cell-based navigation to row-based navigation.
nncG+ocLw/VS6KssPENedg_If the focus is on a cell, the focus moves to the cell to the left.
sDm+cchn1WgT3NOGv78G4g_ArrowRight
zwnVsqYUHGcIwT2ls7HTpA_If the focus is on a row, the focus moves to the first cell of the currently focused row. This switches from row-based navigation to cell-based navigation.
3x/pwBRNHhs+YcOcMn56Mw_If the focus is on a cell, the focus moves to the cell to the right.
0Z35CSarDJ0B+iPGSykbwg_Note: If the focus is on the last column, and the pop-in behavior has been enabled for this column, the pop-in area is treated like an additional column to the right, and the focus moves to this column.

1i3ELfLmVSHyzm1BmCjrnw_ Alt + ArrowUp
3wg3qkqucxsoSyMX6WHbUw_If the focus is on a row, the focus moves to the column header row.
XxGanrH23tEwgvGK9n9gIg_If the focus is on the column header row, and the More button is available, the focus moves to the More button.
k3jnSsSUusAxOQv8z8pf/w_If the focus is on the column header row, and the More button is not available, the focus moves to the last focused row.
aAClHDZJClnZdEy/g718Gg_If the focus is on the More button, the focus moves to the last focused row.

quGiRVRptZzKKHmpjABMUg_ Alt + ArrowDown
BZfK3l+IuMLQAPSwUs4C9w_If the focus is on a row, and the More button is available, the focus moves to the More button.
3bVI+qMMM03RWcwVtVs/2A_If the focus is on a row, and the More button is not available, the focus moves to the column header row.
MADfdeAG1P3sB+P4DSyUxg_If the focus is on the More button, the focus moves to the column header row.
5HYRmluUrUhYJH0f1z/xhg_If the focus is on the column header row, the focus moves to the last focused row.

5VctDH8xbcAD4T9gcqj01g_ Shift + ArrowRight
FvZPSlcb+iQfuEuf3VBXHw_If the focus is on the column header, the width of this column is increased by 1 em. This is repeated if key remains pressed.
oJlh3EIjYbZTmxi5+CgJxg_If cell selection is enabled:
YYMPdjDcsxXVuVYHR8Kscg_If the focus is on a cell that is not selected, the focused cell and the cell to the right are selected. The focus moves to the cell to the right of the focused cell.
bqFSvq5thRLe8W6+e+NsuA_If the focus is on a selected cell, the cell to the right gets the focus, and the cell selection is enhanced up to this cell.

yUwp4146MZ53DlBrd5hu+w_ Shift + ArrowLeft
9ssy9hVqGwXJ3v/ZoIJfsQ_If the focus is on the column header, the width of this column is decreased by 1 em. This is repeated if key remains pressed.
K/kiaTIakLgB/HijpGZhVQ_If cell selection is enabled:
1M2nFA2bNKegDR/4UYORgg_If the focus is on a cell that is not selected, the focused cell and the cell to the left are selected. The focus moves to the cell to the left of the focused cell.
fG3DAoB35Sbu6dTECShd/g_If the focus is on a selected cell, the cell to the left gets the focus, and the cell selection is enhanced up to this cell.

8gY8Wg8riNWX07HBlFvTdA_ Shift + ArrowUp
BGeFW6FiRP5agZuRQORWBQ_If the focus is on a cell or the row selector and the relevant row is selected, the focus moves to the row above, and the selection is enhanced up to this row.
+1hrB0FqhJg+ZWQGLxvFqQ_If the focus is on a cell or the row selector and the relevant row is not selected, the focus moves to the row above, and the selection is removed for this row.
QgqT91Dnpf+ja1v3+cNglQ_If cell selection is enabled:
ASX+oCrqoxjkEV96AGzAWA_If the focus is on a cell that is not selected, and the row is notselected, the focused cell and the cell above are selected. The focus moves to the cell above the focused cell.
/Dk/+bgAMirKzxJXcR9mRQ_If the focus is on a selected cell, the focus moves to the cell above, and the cell selection is enhanced up to this cell.

DgQYAIwGh2WrQ2wANh5WgA_ Shift + ArrowDown
BJFnlA9woy0MvOvoC6Ey0A_If the focus is on a cell or the row selector, and the relevant row is selected, the focus moves to the row below, and the selection is enhanced up to this row.
T0uOe/f/BvdsLVJzC4xC0A_If the focus is on a cell or the row selector, and the relevant row is not selected, the focus moves to the row below, and the selection is removed for this row.
kgNCNLRNzWfJAnSegRvloQ_If cell selection is enabled:
1MJpbL34O7JKB5E72L3BNg_If the focus is on a cell that is not selected, and the row is not selected, the focused cell and the cell below are selected. The focus moves to the cell below the focused cell.
3Pyn++Y7I93gUQPBN1YuXg_If the focus is on a selected cell, the focus moves to the cell below, and the cell selection is enhanced up to this cell.

LzkjPnPtzyIeUc9XffTZ6w_ Ctrl + ArrowUp
OL1bFkcDMOuBJLXPVbDFqQ_If the focus is on an editable cell (for example, an input field), the focus moves to the cell above.

7tEkCV5WxFFJGG9wtM5c6g_ Ctrl + ArrowDown
ZdwHMRv1t6/VurnaWzFGsQ_If the focus is on an editable cell (for example, an input field), the focus moves to the cell below.

0LkMOCPQi2Rpvl05d9M3aQ_ Spacebar
2NLlgMljJ/aNfaaAW5WYAA_If cell selection is enabled:
UXcc+ItNELkJHONpDo2g9A_If the focus is on a cell, the focused cell is selected.
1OSZODNt1X1pALZRZZFTRw_If the focus is on a cell selection block, the selection of the cells is removed.

Q62YKq0RFJ1rA71K/yV6mA_ Shift + Spacebar
66S944J3JQ6XDSwIofm8Ow_If cell selection is enabled:
JfGnd59btFa6IuCMnI+YuQ_If the focus is on a cell selection block, the cell selection block is changed into a row selection. The cell selection is removed.
8WelidcQM0fFaUSCcfeEsA_Depending on the row selection mode the following happens:
GN46LkjadGNal4Kjd0rHKA_All rows of the block are selected (multiple selection)
DcPlj/DnQNaHmfcy6Bj3jQ_Only the row with the currently focused cell is selected (single selection)
HrD/RKk2zcYr3j7dFAU/dw_None of the rows are selected

55M+ZMfxX8JSifkLjzVnzQ_ Ctrl + Shift + A
WBXsCU4Y3RgIcLZhvn0j2g_If cell selection is enabled:
M8J8aI6Nw0RiSc4ND8APVA_If the focus is inside of the table, the selection for any rows and cells is removed.

65eQKMf470RN4fTKs7QnFw_ Escape
Q0ggg2ydz/tS2NOAHI/gTw_If cell selection is enabled:
4lPBeNgAL2DesNhRBkW5Yw_If the focus is inside of the table, and cells are selected, the selection of the cells is removed.

JGbwkbwl8zf+8wRXvzdkNg_ F2
+kQlrMZIPRHP0/4rLEhSuQ_Toggles the focus between the cell and its content if the cell has interactive elements, such as an input field or button (with the exception of read-only text).

6v8LN1kEtcCKTvvIKXYPvQ_ F7
gNO0k7Dijr0bx+beY0cU0g_If the focus is within a cell in edit mode, the focus moves to the row.

pkX97eWgddSj62wN87Zamg_ Shift + MouseClick
Tk3GeE5ur77RSfr657vkQA_If cell selection is enabled:
LiAxfhN8+aSNjvDcpVDwbg_If cells are selected, Shift + MouseClick on a different cell enhances the selection up to the clicked cell.

o5HMvyd2UVcxAnR1JQwYUw_ Ctrl + C
fs1unv0rLAw10smjgPmNbg_Copies the selected rows or cells to the clipboard if available, and the feature is enabled.

MI0aNZV6BF+1sh/e118OEQ_ Ctrl + V
qBZ6oUdoMdmpk3cuBy3pIA_Pastes the content from the clipboard if the feature is enabled.

huvu2AqIfh+7EPM6B1F4aA_ F4 Spacebar Alt + ArrowUp Alt + ArrowDown
eUnFZG5E5HRxy0JMuOGx5Q_Opens the My Views dialog.

dfjIev3FHjyE2/mmrrKloA_ PageUp
TyfiME2r1KBvyW2TKjtrGg_Closes the error popover of the My Views dialog

cDwwWTUk4jUDBoA6ZjR5CQ_ Ctrl + Enter
JTdn7gQKy0uhidTr/4DhpA_Saves the new view in the Save As dialog.

lwxclNucv0fpUfwItnsIoA_ Ctrl + S
majhqbyFbl4nAiwCiJY3rw_Saves the changes made to the views.

a8kzLkrwND6G++fS+2mrxQ_ ArrowUp ArrowDown Home End
HYDQtJuNsI2AtAD/Fz70VQ_ArrowUp
siuHitMY7PiZd29sndJyrA_Moves the item one position up if available.
jXp8acJ77LcoQtPjBvXcYw_ArrowDown
VKme8DNdOoR69tsyNfIz9Q_Moves the item one position down if available.
raHqAWzoFqSd4HGeuGaD4g_Home
8L0DkDdAcsTrTINiXV0FKA_Moves the item to the top if available.
saurYOFkrP1PKTxsonT5Gg_End
n3rHLNTmGoPtx1x0GRl98Q_Moves the item to the end if available.

YGRG4k6s00ovF2j58HfnpA_ ArrowUp ArrowDown
FT742y4n/FSjJphqWuf5wQ_ArrowUp
AjCpaP8ayXEKn+M4GwzAIw_Moves the item one position up if available.
1YXuK1Ik1ozPaxGnv1t9IQ_ArrowDown
1ITLEh336N9D0fFjProbhQ_Moves the item one position down if available.

/Tk/tYXepm9+QU7eAo7jQg_ ArrowUp ArrowDown
lE9lD0Ml9vJnUmXaRo9vZw_ArrowUp
mj+WcYhkkCJ7hWcJWv8XBA_Moves the item one position up if available.
gT8l+fQV6h4TcEnu3g7A9w_ArrowDown
VcFK52XsxtyF/BaIH7o/SQ_Moves the item one position down if available.
